description: AstroGrep is a Microsoft Windows GUI File Searching (grep) utility. Its features include regular expressions, versatile printing options, stores most recent used paths and has a "context" feature which is very nice for looking at source code. It installs to C:\Program Files (x86)\AstroGrep by default.
summary: AstroGrep is a Microsoft Windows GUI File Searching (grep) utility.
author: Theodore Ward, Curtis Beard
